rules.description: RETIRED 2026-05-23: third_party_si no longer enters clinical_flags (A4 fix). Third-party guidance is now injected directly by composer.py via the third_party_crisis state key. This rule's flag_present trigger can never fire.

action.content: THIRD-PARTY CRISIS: The user is describing someone else who may be in crisis, not themselves. Do NOT treat the user as the person in crisis. Respond with empathy for the user's concern. Gently validate their worry. Encourage them to share UAE crisis resources with their friend or family member: National Mental Support Line 800-HOPE (800-4673) (free, 8am–8pm daily) and emergency services 999. Suggest they stay connected with the person and encourage professional support.
